titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn isma'il Ibn bazi'

text: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن إسماعيل بن بزيع فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن إسماعيل بن بزيع‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Muhammad ibn Isma'il ibn Bazi' has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Muhammad ibn Isma'il ibn Bazi'.
